creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I had a machine running and then I issued the following command:

> 	bhyvectl --vm=${NAME} --destroy || bhyvectl --vm=${NAME} --destroy --force-poweroff

as a result I got:

> Assertion failed: (error == 0), function emulate_inout, file /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/inout.c, line 232.
> Abort trap

I am not sure if this is a bug or not.

I'm running FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r357920.
